prompt_text:
Analyze the following java source code repository for violations of the Open/Closed Principle (OCP).

## Principle Definition
Software entities should be open for extension but closed for modification. When adding new behavior requires modifying existing code (e.g., adding elif branches, modifying switch statements), it violates OCP.

## What to Look For
- Long if/elif/else or switch chains that would need modification to add new types
- Functions with type-checking logic (isinstance checks) to ...
raw_response:
{
  "findings": [
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser._getText2",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 331,
      "line_end": 348,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on token ID requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "The _getText2 method uses a switch statement based on token IDs to determine how to retrieve text. Adding a new JSON token type would require modifying this method to add a new case, violating the Open/Closed Principle."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.getStringCharacters",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 351,
      "line_end": 372,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on token ID requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "Similar to _getText2, this method uses a switch statement on token IDs. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, violating OCP."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.getStringLength",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 375,
      "line_end": 396,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on token ID requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "This method uses a switch statement on token IDs to determine length. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, violating OCP."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.getStringOffset",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 399,
      "line_end": 417,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on token ID requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "This method uses a switch statement on token IDs to determine offset. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, violating OCP."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.nextToken",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 622,
      "line_end": 685,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Large switch statement on character input requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "The nextToken method uses a large switch statement to dispatch parsing based on the next character. Adding new language features or token types requires modifying this switch statement, which is a classic OCP violation."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/async/NonBlockingUtf8JsonParserBase.java",
      "entity_name": "NonBlockingUtf8JsonParserBase._finishToken",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 137,
      "line_end": 272,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Large switch statement on minor state requires modification to add new parsing states",
      "reasoning": "The _finishToken method uses a large switch statement to handle different parsing states. Adding new parsing logic requires adding new states to this switch, violating OCP."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/JsonGenerator.java",
      "entity_name": "JsonGenerator.copyCurrentEvent",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 816,
      "line_end": 855,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on token ID requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "The copyCurrentEvent method uses a switch statement on token IDs to determine how to copy the event. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, violating OCP."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8JsonGenerator.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8JsonGenerator._verifyValueWrite",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 1059,
      "line_end": 1086,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on context status requires modification to add new status types",
      "reasoning": "The _verifyValueWrite method uses a switch statement on context status to determine the separator. Adding new status types requires modifying this method, violating OCP."
    }
  ]
}
